results.title: Pakistani Forces Kills 75 Rebels In Balochistan After Cops Blindfolded, Shot Dead
results.description: Islamabad: Pakistani security forces backed by military helicopters have killed 75 insurgents in dayslong operations against an outlawed separatist group blamed for a wave of attacks on troops, police and civilians in restive Balochistan province, officials said Friday. results.title: Payal Rohatgi Advocates for Authenticity in Reality TV
results.description: Actor Payal Rohatgi voices her concerns about the evolving nature of reality television, emphasizing the need for authenticity in shows like Lock Upp. Drawing from her experiences in various reality formats, she critiques the trend of scripted drama that detracts from genuine storytelling. Payal reflects on her time in Nach Baliye, where she felt producers manipulated narratives for ratings. As Lock Upp Season 2 approaches, she hopes it will maintain its unscripted essence, allowing contestants to showcase their true selves. Her insights spark a broader conversation about the future of reality TV in an era dominated by dramatized content.

results.title: KDMC Hospital Assault: Victim Doctor’s Father Alleges Cover-Up, Seeks CM Fadnavis’ Intervention
results.description: Mumbai: The father of the doctor allegedly assaulted during the July 6 violence at KDMC’s Shastri Nagar Hospital in Dombivli has alleged that attempts are being made to shield the accused and urged Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis to ensure the safety of healthcare workers, especially women doctors. results.title: Trump restarts Iran war but pulls F-22 raptors out of Israel; abandons US support for Netanyahu?
results.description: The U.S. Air Force has reportedly withdrawn a number of F-22 Raptor stealth fighters from Israel’s Ovda Air Base and repositioned them to RAF Fairford in the United Kingdom as part of post-campaign force adjustments, after the jets were deployed in late February to support U.S. operations against Iran.
